scripts.dev: concurrently -n PopJot,PopKey -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix app/modules/popjot" "npm run dev --prefix app/modules/popkey"
scripts.build: concurrently -n PopJot,PopKey -c cyan,magenta "npm run build --prefix app/modules/popjot" "npm run build --prefix app/modules/popkey"
scripts.dev:suite: concurrently -n suite:popjot,suite:popkey -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:popjot --prefix app" "npm run dev:popkey --prefix app"
scripts.typecheck: concurrently -n PopJot,PopKey,suite -c cyan,magenta,green "npm run typecheck --prefix app/modules/popjot" "npm run typecheck --prefix app/modules/popkey" "npm run typecheck --prefix app"
scripts.lint: concurrently -n PopJot,PopKey -c cyan,magenta "npm run lint --prefix app/modules/popjot" "npm run lint --prefix app/modules/popkey"
scripts.test: concurrently -n PopJot,PopKey -c cyan,magenta "npm run test --prefix app/modules/popjot" "npm run test --prefix app/modules/popkey"
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test
